placingMetrics.name: Wins
placingMetrics.description: Total match wins for a player. Ties are worth 0.5 wins, but recommended you use Swiss Points instead of wins if ties are possible.

placingMetrics.name: Oppt. Game Win %
placingMetrics.description: The average of all your opponents' game win percentage with a minimum cap of 33%.

placingMetrics.name: Battle Points
placingMetrics.description: Total points earned from game submitted.

placingMetrics.name: Victory Points before Differential
placingMetrics.description: Total Victory Points earned prior to a Victory Point Differential from games submitted. This should only be used when using a Differential Scorecard

placingMetrics.name: Points Destroyed
placingMetrics.description: Total points of all units completely destroyed across all games.

placingMetrics.name: Wins SoS
placingMetrics.description: The sum of all of player's opponents win totals, divided by the number of opponents player has played.

placingMetrics.name: Battle Points SoS
placingMetrics.description: The sum of all of player's opponents' average battle point per game, divided by the number of opponents player has played.

placingMetrics.name: Swiss Points
placingMetrics.description: 3 points are award for every win the player receives, 1 point for every tie and 0 points for every loss. This is then the total of all those points awarded

placingMetrics.name: Path to Victory
placingMetrics.description: Measures a player's win path relative to other players where earlier losses are more impactful than later losses.

placingMetrics.name: Extended Oppt. Game Win %
placingMetrics.description: The average of all your opponents opponents' game win percentage with a minimum cap of 33%.

placingMetrics.name: Swiss SoS
placingMetrics.description: The sum of all of player's opponents Swiss Points, divided by the number of opponents player has played.

placingMetrics.name: Margin of Victory
placingMetrics.description: The sum of all of player's opponents Swiss Points, divided by the number of opponents player has played.

placingMetrics.name: Wins Extended SoS
placingMetrics.description: The sum of all of player's opponents Wins SoS, divided by the number of opponents player has played.

placingMetrics.name: Battle Points Extended SoS
placingMetrics.description: The sum of all of player's opponents Battle Points SoS, divided by the number of opponents player has played.

placingMetrics.name: Match Points
placingMetrics.description: Total match points for the team. 2 match points are awarded for a team winning their match, 1 point is awarded for a tie and 0 for a loss.

placingMetrics.name: Wins SoS
placingMetrics.description: The sum of all of team's opponents match win totals, divided by the number of opponents team has played.

placingMetrics.name: Battle Points
placingMetrics.description: The sum total of all Battle Points earned from each player on the team.

placingMetrics.name: Victory Points before Differential
placingMetrics.description: Total Victory Points earned prior to a Victory Point Differential from games submitted. This should only be used when using a Differential Scorecard

placingMetrics.name: Game Wins
placingMetrics.description: Total games won by individual players on the team.

placingMetrics.name: Points Destroyed
placingMetrics.description: The sum total of all Points Destroyed earned from each player on the team.

placingMetrics.description: The sum of all of team's opponents' match points, divided by the number of opponents team has played.

placingMetrics.name: Game Wins SoS
placingMetrics.description: The sum of all of team's opponents' average game wins per match, divided by the number of opponents team has played.

placingMetrics.name: Battle Points SoS
placingMetrics.description: The sum of all of team's opponents' average battle point per match, divided by the number of opponents team has played.

placingMetrics.name: Match Points Extended SoS
placingMetrics.description: The sum of all of team's opponents Match Points SoS, divided by the number of opponents team has played.

placingMetrics.description: The sum of all of team's opponents Game Wins SoS, divided by the number of opponents team has played.

placingMetrics.name: Battle Points Extended SoS
placingMetrics.description: The sum of all of team's opponents Battle Points SoS, divided by the number of opponents team has played.

placingMetrics.name: Swiss Points
placingMetrics.description: 3 points are award for every win the team receives, 1 point for every tie and 0 points for every loss. This is then the total of all those points awarded

placingMetrics.name: Swiss SoS
placingMetrics.description: The sum of all of team's opponents Swiss Points, divided by the number of opponents team has played.

placingMetrics.name: Swiss Points Extended SoS
placingMetrics.description: The sum of all of team's opponents Swiss Points SoS, divided by the number of opponents team has played.

placingMetrics.name: Victory Points before Differential
placingMetrics.description: Total Victory Points earned prior to a Victory Point Differential from games submitted. This should only be used when using a Differential Scorecard

placingMetrics.name: Points Destroyed
placingMetrics.description: Total points of all units completely destroyed across all games.

placingMetrics.name: Wins SoS
placingMetrics.description: The sum of all of player's opponents win totals, divided by the number of opponents player has played.

placingMetrics.name: Battle Points SoS
placingMetrics.description: The sum of all of player's opponents' average battle point per game, divided by the number of opponents player has played.

placingMetrics.name: Swiss Points
placingMetrics.description: 3 points are award for every win the player receives, 1 point for every tie and 0 points for every loss. This is then the total of all those points awarded

placingMetrics.name: Path to Victory
placingMetrics.description: Measures a player's win path relative to other players where earlier losses are more impactful than later losses.

placingMetrics.description: The average of all your opponents' game win percentage with a minimum cap of 33%.

placingMetrics.description: The average of all your opponents opponents' game win percentage with a minimum cap of 33%.
